title: T-019 — API: Allergen contamination risk matrix CRUD
prompt:
# T-019 — API: Allergen contamination risk matrix CRUD

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §10.5, §10.8
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Cross-contamination risk grid CRUD with coverage-gap report.

Coverage gap = LEFT JOIN production_lines × allergens_reference (EU-14) without entries. Useful for V-TEC-43 dashboard. Permission gate uses technical.allergens.edit on writes.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/api/technical/allergens/contamination-risk/route.ts [create]
- lib/technical/allergens/contamination.ts [create]
- tests/api/contamination-risk.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- Allergen changeover gate (08-PRODUCTION cross-cuts)
- UI

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given line L1 has entry only for A01, when GET /contamination-risk?line_id=L1, then response includes 'gaps' array of remaining EU-14 codes.
2. Given POST risk_level='extreme', when validated, then 422 (not in enum).
3. Given valid upsert, when re-POST same key, then update wins (no duplicate).

## Test strategy
- RED tests for gap computation + enum + upsert.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/api/contamination-risk.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not couple to 08-PRODUCTION allergen gate code here.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
